# Web3 Product Manager Skills

Canonical repo: https://github.com/kimogrant/web3-product-manager-skill

Agent Skills package for Web3 product management (strategy memo, PRD, tokenomics and compliance gates).

## Skills (install all three)

- web3-product-manager — orchestrator; read skills/web3-product-manager/references/pipeline-summary.md first
- web3-product-strategy — go/no-go, phases 1-5, strategy memo
- web3-product-specification — gates 0-4, PRD, DeFi/L2/Consumer domain references

## Install

- Unix: ./skill.sh install <project-path>
- Windows: .\install.ps1 <project-path>

Target: <project>/.cursor/skills/<skill-name>/

## Key files

- skills/web3-product-strategy/SKILL.md
- skills/web3-product-specification/SKILL.md
- examples/strategy-memo-sample.md
- examples/prd-story-sample.md
- VERSION
